content: Decision: Use SQLite for all storage. No external DB dependency needed for local MCP server.
Architecture pattern: Repository pattern for all DB access. Each entity gets its own repository class.
Error pattern: SQLite BUSY error when concurrent writes attempted. Solution: single-writer pattern with better-sqlite3 synchronous API.
TODO: Add migration rollback script for V3 schema changes. Currently only forward migrations supported.
QA test plan: All new MCP tools must have E2E tests via stdio protocol. Use JSON-RPC format.
Implementation note: Token counting uses chars/4 approximation. Acceptable for 2000 token budget.
Requirement: Agent scope filtering must not degrade search performance. Filter at query level.
DevOps: Deploy v0.6.0 requires running backfill script after migration. Script is idempotent.
Stale WORKING entry that should be expired - created 48 hours ago with low quality score for testing auto-expiry functionality.
